assertions.rationale: The class does not implement ISamlClaimsMapper — it's a standalone class with no interface.

assertions.assertion: The mapper returns SamlAttribute objects with custom Name values
assertions.rationale: SamlAttribute objects with custom names are created.

assertions.assertion: Warns that ISamlClaimsMapper completely replaces default claim mapping — DefaultClaimMappings are not applied
assertions.rationale: No warning about replacing default mappings.

assertions.assertion: Registers the custom mapper with dependency injection (e.g., AddTransient)
assertions.rationale: No DI registration shown; response says to 'register it' but doesn't show the ISamlClaimsMapper registration.
